purpose: Local deterministic strategic foresight advisory report for manually supplied AI-agent market, protocol, risk, and readiness signals.

sampleSignals.title: Developer wrapper demand increasing
sampleSignals.summary: Manual sample signal: reviewers and developers value a small wrapTool-style pattern before sensitive actions.

sampleSignals.title: Pre-settlement trust remains central
sampleSignals.summary: Manual sample signal: settlement-sensitive workflows should keep requiring mandate, evidence, freshness, nonce, and signed GatePass checks.

sampleSignals.title: Agent-to-agent protocol discussion should be watched
sampleSignals.summary: Manual sample signal: delegation and claimed identity may need local proof challenge examples, without live agent-to-agent communication.

sampleSignals.title: Post-quantum readiness should be watched but not claimed
sampleSignals.summary: Manual sample signal: future signed proof designs may need crypto-agility planning, while current code makes no production-grade crypto claim.

sampleSignals.title: Reviewer feedback favours measurable demos
sampleSignals.summary: Manual sample signal: keep GatePass measurable, reviewer-friendly, and copy-paste useful rather than expanding broad concepts.

recommendedMissions.title: Consider a future local wrapper ergonomics mission
Consider a future pre-settlement GatePass hardening mission

safetyBoundary: Local advisory layer only. No live monitoring, scraping, autonomous learning, autonomous outreach, autonomous product changes, autonomous roadmap changes, autonomous code changes, prediction guarantee, network calls, live agent contact, direct bot messaging, or action execution.
